title: TCT ClearLag
description: Add a Clearlag to your world or your server to improve your performance in large structures with many items
body:
## clearlag
Clearlag improves the performance of servers and worlds with large structures and many collectable items by removing all items from the ground.

⚠️ This mod requires TCTCore to function. ⚠️

## Features

- Automatic object cleanup at configurable intervals
- Optional player notifications
- Command to trigger manual cleanup
Fully adjustable timer (normal version)

## Configuration:

- The default interval is 5 minutes.
- Permission level 2 or higher is required to modify the settings.
- Enabling/disabling notifications does not require permission (player-specific settings).
- /clearlagset <seconds> – Change the interval
- /clearlagnotify <true/false> – Enable/disable notifications
- /clearlagn

If you would like a custom interval for your server, please feel free to contact me.
